_publications._publicationTitle: Neuregulin-1 beta and neuregulin-1 alpha differentially affect the migration and invasion of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cells.

_contextSnippet: strong erbB3 immunoreactivity was associated with the plasma membrane of tumor cells (Fig. 1 A). Lower level, focally punctate erbB3 immunoreactivity was also present in the cytoplasm of tumor cells
details: Successfully demonstrated strong erbB3 immunoreactivity associated with plasma membrane of MPNST tumor cells and lower level cytoplasmic staining
